headline: How Is Regency Centers' Stock Performance Compared to Other Real Estate Stocks?
summary: Although Regency Centers has outperformed relative to its peers on a YTD basis, Wall Street analysts maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
